settings.heading: Wellness Programs
settings.description: Full wellness program details of the Colic Assurance Program including dosing and supplement protocols.

settings.content:
Each enrolled horse is assigned to one of two wellness programs based on enrollment answers. Dosing protocols must be followed to maintain eligibility.

Products are organized into three weight brackets: 200–799 lb, 800–1300 lb, and 1301 lb+.
For horses with no prior history of colic. Assure Guard paired with Assure Plus, or Assure Guard Gold as a single-product option.

settings.alt: Colic Free Wellness Program dosing protocol

settings.content: For horses with a prior history of colic. Adjusted dosing protocols to provide enhanced digestive support.

settings.alt: Colic History Wellness Program dosing protocol

settings.content: Note: Dosing protocols must be followed as prescribed to maintain program eligibility. Retain all product purchase receipts.
